kirundi.complete_a_challenge_using_fewer_than_: Uzuza imbogamizi ukoresheje udutsi turi munsi ya 5
kirundi.use_random_block_in_a_repeat_loop: Koresha agace katoranijwe muri loop yo gusubiramo
kirundi.drag_a_move_forward_block_to_your_prog: Kurura agace ko kujya imbere muri porogaramu yawe hanyuma ukande tangiza!
kirundi.draw_a_square_using_move_and_turn_bloc: Shushanya kare ukoresheje udutsi two kujya no guhindukira.
kirundi.draw_the_same_square_using_a_repeat_bl: Shushanya kare imwe ukoresheje agace ko gusubiramo.
kirundi.use_repeat_4_with_move_forward_and_tur: Koresha gusubiramo 4× hamwe no kujya imbere no guhindukira iburyo 90° imbere.
kirundi.draw_3_lines_each_a_different_color: Shushanya imirongo 3+, buri umwe ibara ritandukanye.
kirundi.use_set_color_blocks_between_your_move: Koresha udutsi two gushyiraho ibara hagati y'udutsi twawe two kujya imbere.
kirundi.this_is_tricky_try_increasing_the_dist: Ibi biragoye! Gerageza kongera intera buri gihe.
kirundi.create_any_drawing_with_20_line_segmen: Rema igishushanyo icyo ari cyo cyose gifite uduce tw'umurongo 20+.
kirundi.draw_a_house_a_square_base_with_a_tria: Shushanya inzu: urufatiro rwa kare rufite igisenge cy'umutatu hejuru.
kirundi.draw_a_square_then_use_pen_up_to_move_: Shushanya kare, hanyuma ukoreshe zamura ikaramu kugira ngo wimuke, hanyuma ushushanye umutatu w'igisenge. Tekereza ku mfuruka: kare = 90°, umutatu = 120°.
kirundi.study_this_finished_square_then_click_: Iga iyi kare yarangiye, hanyuma ukande tangiza kugira ngo ubone uko ishushanywa.
kirundi.notice_the_pattern_move_turn_repeated_: Menya ishusho: jya, hindukira, byasubiyemo inshuro enye.
kirundi.this_loop_should_draw_a_square_but_it_: Iyi loop yagombye gushushanya kare ariko guhindukira kurabuze. Ongeraho hindukira iburyo 90 muri gusubiramo.
kirundi.add_turn_right_90_after_the_move_forwa: Muri agace ko gusubiramo, nyuma yo kujya imbere ongeraho hindukira iburyo 90.
kirundi.a_finished_triangle_made_with_a_loop_r: Umutatu warangiye wakozwe na loop. Wutangize, hanyuma usome uko ukora.
kirundi.repeat_three_times_move_forward_then_t: Subiramo inshuro eshatu: jya imbere, hanyuma hindukira 120.
kirundi.almost_a_hexagon_add_the_missing_turn_: Hafi y'impande esheshatu. Ongeraho guhindukira kwabuze muri loop kugira ngo uyifunge.
kirundi.add_turn_right_60_after_the_move_forwa: Muri agace ko gusubiramo, nyuma yo kujya imbere ongeraho hindukira iburyo 60.
kirundi.check_if_standing_on_a_gem: Reba niba uhagaze ku ibuye ry'agaciro
kirundi.pick_up_the_gem_at_current_position: Fata ibuye ry'agaciro ku mwanya uriho
kirundi.move_the_robot_forward_3_spaces_to_rea: Imura robo imbere imyanya 3 kugira ngo ugere ku ntego!
kirundi.navigate_around_the_corner_to_reach_th: Genda uzenguruka imfuruka kugira ngo ugere ku ntego.
kirundi.move_forward_then_turn_then_move_forwa: Jya imbere, hanyuma hindukira, hanyuma jya imbere nanone.
kirundi.use_a_repeat_block_to_reach_the_goal_e: Koresha agace ko gusubiramo kugira ngo ugere ku ntego mu buryo bunoze.
kirundi.move_through_the_path_and_collect_all_: Nyura mu nzira kandi ukusanye amabuye y'agaciro yose 3!
kirundi.move_to_each_gem_and_use_collect_gem_o: Jya kuri buri ibuye ry'agaciro kandi ukoreshe «Kusanya ibuye ry'agaciro» kuri buri rimwe.
kirundi.use_if_wall_ahead_to_navigate_a_maze_w: Koresha «Niba urukuta ruri imbere» kugira ngo unyure mu rusobe rufite imihindukire!
kirundi.combine_while_not_at_goal_with_if_wall: Huza «Mu gihe utaragera ku ntego» na «Niba urukuta ruri imbere» → hindukira iburyo, bitabaye ibyo → jya imbere.
kirundi.paint_all_the_unpainted_cells_in_the_r: Saka utugari twose tutarasakwa mu murongo!
kirundi.use_repeat_with_move_forward_and_paint: Koresha gusubiramo hamwe na «Jya imbere» na «Saka akagari».
kirundi.navigate_the_spiral_maze_using_loops_a: Nyura mu rusobe rw'inzunguruka ukoresheje loops n'ibisabwa!
kirundi.try_while_not_at_goal_if_wall_turn_rig: Gerageza «Mu gihe utaragera ku ntego»: niba urukuta → hindukira iburyo, bitabaye ibyo → jya imbere.
kirundi.collect_all_gems_and_reach_the_goal_us: Kusanya amabuye y'agaciro yose ugere ku ntego! Koresha ibyo wize byose.
kirundi.plan_your_path_carefully_you_may_need_: Tegura inzira yawe witonze. Ushobora gukenera loops zishyizwe imbere y'izindi!
kirundi.add_coding_blocks_from_this_toolbox_to: Ongeraho udutsi tw'ikode duturutse muri aka gasanduku k'ibikoresho kugira ngo wubake porogaramu yawe.
kirundi.each_block_is_a_command_set_values_wit: Buri kace ni itegeko. Shyiraho indangagaciro ukoresheje uduce tw'imibare. Kurura udutsi kugira ngo utondekanye!
kirundi.click_run_to_watch_your_program_execut: Kanda tangiza kugira ngo urebe porogaramu yawe ikora intambwe ku ntambwe kuri canvas.
kirundi.try_challenges_to_learn_cs_concepts_li: Gerageza imbogamizi kugira ngo wige ibitekerezo bya siyansi ya mudasobwa nka loops kandi ubone XP! 🏆
kirundi.switch_to_code_mode_for_javascript_lik: Hindukira mu buryo bw'ikode kubera syntax nka JavaScript. Byose biguma bihuza!
kirundi.welcome_to_the_coding_playground: Murakaza neza ku kibuga cy'imikino cy'ikode!
kirundi.sub_millisecond_imperceptible_to_user_: Munsi ya miliseconde imwe. Ntibyumvikana ku mukoresha. Bitekanye kuri loops zo imbere zihagaze.
kirundi.1_ms_well_within_frame_rate_budget_saf: < 1 miliseconde. Mu ngengo y'umuvuduko w'amashusho mu buryo bwiza; bitekanye kuri abacunga ibikorwa bya UI.
kirundi.1ms_1s_will_visibly_lag_ui_needs_progr: 1ms–1s. Bizatinza UI ku buryo bugaragara; bisaba umurongo w'iterambere cyangwa kwimurirwa hanze ya thread nyamukuru.
kirundi.seconds_to_minutes_batch_job_territory: Amasegonda kugeza ku minota. Akarere k'akazi ka batch; umukoresha agenda kuzana ikawa.
kirundi.practically_infinite_at_this_scale_nee: Mu by'ukuri ntibirangira kuri uru rugero. Bisaba algorithm nziza cyangwa input ntoya.
kirundi.big_o_inquiry_predict_the_slowdown: 🔬 Iperereza rya Big-O — Hanura igabanuka ry'umuvuduko
kirundi.set_input_size_loop_depth_data_structu: Shyiraho ingano ya input, ubujyakuzimu bwa loop, imiterere y'amakuru n'imiterere ya recursion. Hanura uko ikode yawe izakora vuba (cyangwa buhoro) mbere yo kuyigerageza. Nta manota, nta guhishura.
kirundi.your_hypothesis_which_change_buys_the_: Igitekerezo cyawe (ni iyihe mpinduka igura umuvuduko munini — n ntoya, loops nke, cyangwa imiterere y'amakuru itandukanye?)
kirundi.e_g_swapping_array_scan_for_hash_looku: Urugero, gusimbuza gusikana array no gushaka hash kugabanya ikiguzi cya loop yo hanze ku gipimo cya n…
kirundi.why_does_loop_depth_multiply_rather_th: Kuki ubujyakuzimu bwa loop bukuba umubare w'ibikorwa aho kubyongeraho?
kirundi.when_does_it_matter_that_hash_lookup_i: Ni ryari bifite akamaro ko gushaka hash ari O(1) — kuri n=10? n=1,000? n=1,000,000?
kirundi.exponential_recursion_explodes_after_r: Recursion exponentielle iturika hafi nyuma ya n iyo ari yo yose. Ikubita urukuta he neza?
kirundi.for_very_small_n_sometimes_o_n_beats_o: Kuri n ntoya cyane, rimwe na rimwe O(n²) inesha O(n log n). Kuki?
kirundi.i_can_explain_why_this_combination_of_: Nshobora gusobanura impamvu iri huriro rya n, ubujyakuzimu, imiterere y'amakuru na recursion rigarukira hano.
kirundi.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget y'iperereza — nta manota, nta guhishura, nta rufunguzo rw'igisubizo. Imibare y'ibikorwa ni igereranyo ry'uburezi n'iry'urugero rifata ~1 GHz ya throughput nyayo; imikorere nyayo ishingiye kuri cache, branch prediction, JIT n'ibihagararo bibanziriza ijambo Big-O.
kirundi.ai_explains_what_your_code_does: AI isobanura icyo ikode yawe ikora
kirundi.ai_suggests_what_to_try_next: AI itanga igitekerezo cy'icyo wagerageza ubutaha
kirundi.ai_helps_debug_your_challenge_attempt: AI ifasha gukosora amakosa y'igeragezwa ryawe ry'imbogamizi
kirundi.turtle_logo_s_drawing_robot_born_1967: Inkeri — robo ishushanya ya LOGO, yavutse mu 1967
kirundi.move_forward_turn_pen_down_a_few_primi: Jya imbere, hindukira, manura ikaramu: amabwiriza make y'ibanze → fractals, inzunguruka, polygones. Igitabo cya Seymour Papert Mindstorms (1980) cyerekanye ko abana bashobora kubaka ubwenge bw'imibare bigisha inkeri, atari ku rundi ruhande.
kirundi.robot_navigate_the_grid_collect_solve: Robo — nyura mu rusobekerane, kusanya, kemura
kirundi.sequencing_conditionals_loops_function: Gukurikiranya → ibisabwa → loops → functions, byafunzwe mu rusobe ushobora kubona. Bigaragaza Karel the Robot (Stanford 1981) n'ibisakuzo bya code.org bigezweho. Amakosa abaye ay'umwanya: «yakubise urukuta».
kirundi.drag_commands_into_your_program_use_if: 💡 Kurura amabwiriza muri porogaramu yawe. Koresha udutsi twa niba/mu gihe ku rugendo rw'ubwenge!
kirundi.click_commands_from_the_toolbox_to_bui: Kanda amabwiriza aturutse mu gasanduku k'ibikoresho kugira ngo wubake porogaramu yawe!
kirundi.csta_k_12_iste_ct_sequencing_loops_con: CSTA K-12 • ISTE CT • Gukurikiranya, loops, ibisabwa, algorithms
kirundi.click_blocks_above_or_load_a_template_: Kanda udutsi turi hejuru cyangwa pakira inyandiko-rugero kugira ngo utangire
kirundi.forward_50_right_90_backward_30_repeat:
forward(50)
right(90)
backward(30)

repeat(4, function() {
  forward(100)
  right(90)
})
kirundi.commands_forward_n_backward_n_right_de: Amabwiriza: forward(n) backward(n) right(deg) left(deg) penUp() penDown() setColor("#hex") setWidth(n) circle(r) goto(x,y) home() arc(angle,radius) stamp() playNote(freq,dur). Impinduka: setVar("name",value) changeVar("name",delta) random("name",min,max) — koresha impinduka na $ (nka forward($name)). Loops na logique bikoresha curly braces: repeat(n){ ... }  while (x < 450){ ... }  if (x > 250){ ... } else { ... }. Functions: function myShape(){ ... } hanyuma uyihamagare na myShape(). Ibisabwa bigereranya x, y, angle cyangwa $var bikoresheje > < >= <= == != .
